pipeline: A( S( snn[ NSE(GNE(TC)) ⊕ PLA ] ⊗ WC( FC[nn→Lnn] ⊗ ⊕⊗ ))) ≅ S∞

nn.Module.description: Atomic legal construct with forward (apply) and backward (challenge) passes

nn.Sequential.description: Chain legal instruments where output of one feeds the next
instances: Evidence → Element Satisfaction → Burden Test → Filing
Void ab initio → Rescission → Contempt Defence → Counter-Application

nn.Parallel.description: Run independent legal channels in parallel, merge results
instances: CIPC ⊕ NPA ⊕ SARS ⊕ SAICA — parallel regulatory filings

nn.Criterion.description: Loss function measuring gap between evidence and burden of proof

nn.Linear.description: Linear mapping from evidence dimensions to legal element satisfaction

nn.Tanh.description: Constrain outputs to valid probability range [-1, 1] → [0, 1]

\u03bb_void_ab_initio.promise: The ex parte interdict is void ab initio
constraints: Material non-disclosure of FNB sole mandate (K: email evidence)
Material non-disclosure of Sage accounting access (K: system logs)
Material non-disclosure of Stock2Shop control (K: API records)
Perjury in founding affidavit (K: J417 contradictions)

\u03bb_criminal_liability.promise: Peter committed fraud, forgery, and perjury beyond reasonable doubt
constraints: Trust deed forgery with backdated resolution (K: document forensics)
Revenue diversion via controlled systems (K: bank + Sage + Stock2Shop)
False sworn statements (K: J417 vs email evidence)
Pattern of racketeering (K: 3+ offences over 4+ years)

\u03bb_bantjies_complicity.promise: Bantjies knowingly facilitated fraud through professional misconduct
constraints: Conflict of interest as trustee + accountant (K: SAICA rules)
False J417 declaration (K: provable foreknowledge emails)
Failed to report fraud to authorities (K: APA s45 duty)
Aided revenue diversion through accounting manipulation (K: Sage access logs)

L4_hour.legal_analog: Business day events, bank processing windows

L7_month.legal_analog: Financial reporting periods, bank statement cycles

L9_year.legal_analog: Annual returns, audit cycles, prescription periods

pipeline_stages.name: evidence_gap_analysis
pipeline_stages.input: v16 simulation results + backward pass gradients

pipeline_stages.name: convergence_check
pipeline_stages.output: delta analysis — did cognitive grip improve?

pipeline_stages.output: git commit + push + GitHub Pages update

patterns.evidence_distribution: Forensic and relational evidence strongest; testimonial weakest
patterns.precedent_integration: 15 case law authorities mapped to filings
patterns.temporal_coverage: 12-level hierarchy from μs (email headers) to epoch (full timeline)

meta_reflections: The dual-channel architecture provides complementary perspectives — NSE gives structural insight, PLA gives constraint satisfaction
Testimonial evidence remains the primary bottleneck for criminal burden

analysis.self_awareness_quality: Pipeline correctly identifies its own weaknesses via backward pass
analysis.improvement_trajectory: v15→v16: +0.03 civil, +0.02 criminal. Diminishing returns expected.
analysis.channel_utilization: Both channels active — no over-reliance on single perspective
analysis.composability_health: All 8 semiring laws verified — algebraic foundation sound

meta_reflections: The system's self-assessment of testimonial weakness is accurate — this is not a false negative
The overconfidence penalty (-0.05) is appropriate given the testimonial gap
Precedent authority research (v16.3) significantly strengthened legal grounding

The 5-level hierarchy is sufficient — adding more levels would not improve grip
The system's ability to identify that data is the bottleneck (not architecture) demonstrates genuine self-awareness
